reasoning: Emotional (60%): The gold-orange outer ring with teal swirl center is warm, saturated, and classically treasure-like — earns the bright/friendly Hyrule mood well. However the gear/cog outer silhouette skews steampunk-industrial rather than the organic, mystical relic aesthetic expected in Echoes of Wisdom. The round silhouette and warm palette are correct but the design language reads as crafted machinery rather than ancient artifact. Emotional score ~7. Technical (40%): Pixel execution is solid — 1px hard outlines visible, no anti-aliasing, 3-tone hard shading on the gold ring (bright highlight / mid gold / dark amber), 2-tone on teal center, pixel-grid-snapped throughout. Denzi peer reference confirms this category favors tight multi-tone shading with clean outlines, which the candidate meets. Technical score ~8. Weighted composite: 0.6×7 + 0.4×8 = 7.4 → 7. Verdict: marginal. Recommend revising outer silhouette toward a more emblematic/medallion form (star, triforce-adjacent motif, organic jewel setting) to lift emotional score into pass range.
